headline: Here is why Nucor (NUE) is Among the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade
summary: Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) is one of the 10 Best Stocks to Buy for the Next Decade. On April 15, 2026, Wells Fargo raised its price target on Nucor Corporation (NYSE:NUE) to $213 from $197 and maintained an Overweight rating, saying it has become more constructive on steel and aluminum heading into Q1 results, while taking […]
